---
name: Structured Suggestion
about: Propose improvements aligned with the guide’s scope.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## What Is Being Proposed?
Describe the improvement clearly.

---

## Why Is This Necessary?
Explain the operational reasoning.

---

## Does This Align With Scope?
Confirm this does NOT:
- Introduce preference debates
- Expand into server use
- Replace upstream policy

---

## Risk Model Impact
Does this change:
- Stability assumptions?
- Security posture?
- Snapshot model?

---

## Proposed Text (Optional)
Provide exact markdown if possible.
